description: Letter fragment. In Judaeo-Arabic. Mentions an illness and Manṣūr al-Ḥarīrī. Also mentions Shimʿon and "fulān" suggesting it could be a draft or something legal. On verso mentions a gentile and that "they brought the Jew. . . all that he owned and threw. . . naked (f.) in prison. . . ." On verso, in different ink, there is a Hebrew sentence about sheḥita as well as a few words in large Arabic script underneath.
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
